title: Crispy Resinous Norwegian Pork Skewers
description: A paleo-friendly Norwegian dish featuring crispy pork skewers with a resinous flavor, paired with raspberries and pickle, perfect for a quick dinner or meal prep
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut sugar, arrowroot powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar mixture
Thread the coated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Drizzle the coconut oil over the skewers and toss to coat
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown
While the skewers are baking, mix the pickle juice and raspberries in a small bowl
Serve the crispy pork skewers with the raspberry pickle sauce
